BatteryStatus

public enum BatteryStatus

Battery status

Since

0.4
  • notSupported

    The battery status is not supported.

    Declaration

    Swift

    case notSupported
  • none

    No battery

    Declaration

    Swift

    case none
  • low

    The battery is low.

    Declaration

    Swift

    case low
  • full

    The battery is full.

    Declaration

    Swift

    case full
  • usbPlugged

    The USB is plugged.

    Declaration

    Swift
